retrieved_result: Why did Apple register its headquarters in California, rather than Delaware? Matthew Graczyk, Entrepreneur, activist philanthropist Answered Jun 10, 2016 · Author has 193 answers and 274.1k answer views If Apple originally incorporated in California, they reincorporated in Delaware later on (as many/most large US corporations do due to the favorable legal environment for bus
